prompt: The HTTP response code check is always wrong. What is the bug?
choices: URLConnection must be connected before checking any response properties
getContentLength() returns the Content-Length header value, not the HTTP status code; to get the response code, cast to HttpURLConnection and call getResponseCode()
getResponseCode() is called on the InputStream, not the connection object
HTTP response codes are only available after reading the entire response body
explanation: URLConnection does not expose getResponseCode(); that method is on HttpURLConnection. getContentLength() returns the Content-Length header (or -1 if unknown), not the HTTP status code. Fix: cast to HttpURLConnection hc = (HttpURLConnection) url.openConnection(); then call hc.getResponseCode().
